うん？ この分厚い書物は何かって？<br>いい質問だな。これは、我らが前世で交わ:
Hm? You're asking what this thick tome is? An excellent question.
This is the record of the covenant we forged in our past life.
こ、心して読め……。これはただの物語ではない。魂の真実を映す『鏡』だ。<br>下:
P-prepare yourself... This is no ordinary tale but a 'mirror' reflecting
the soul's truth. Peer carelessly and your soul may be devoured...
漆黒の呪いを宿す少女と、英雄の光を秘めし者、２人が再び相見える時、<br>世界の:
A girl bearing a jet-black curse and a Hero's light-bearer—when they
meet, the world's gears turn. That's the heroic tale.
え、えと……実はこれ……わたくしと<user>様を<br>主役にしたオリジナルの:
U-um, well... Actually, this... it's an original dark fantasy novel
starring me and Milord...
わたくしの願望を込めた小説と言うか……な、なんていうかその……。<br>今後もそ:
I-it's a novel infused with my wishes... you could say... 'I hope we'll
always stay in this wonderful relationship'... Th-that's the gist.
